summary.en: For Myanmar BESS projects, IEC 62619 evidence for secondary lithium cells and batteries for industrial applications is a practical anchor where MSTRD, buyers, utilities, or lenders ask for internationally recognized battery safety documentation.
summary.zh: 对缅甸储能项目，如MSTRD、买方、电力单位或贷款方要求国际认可的电池安全文件，IEC 62619是工业用途二次锂电芯和电池证据的实际锚点。
summary.zht: 對緬甸儲能項目，如MSTRD、買方、電力單位或貸款方要求國際認可的電池安全文件，IEC 62619是工業用途二次鋰電芯和電池證據的實際錨點。

standards_or_laws: Myanmar Standards based on IEC where adopted

summary.en: Common China BESS evidence is typically built around GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion batteries for energy storage, GB 4943.1 for electrical safety where applicable, and GB/T 34131 for grid-connected energy storage converter requirements.
summary.zh: 中国常见储能系统证据通常以GB/T 36276储能用锂离子电池、适用时的GB 4943.1电气安全，以及GB/T 34131并网储能变流器要求为基础。
summary.zht: 中國常見儲能系統證據通常以GB/T 36276儲能用鋰離子電池、適用時的GB 4943.1電氣安全，以及GB/T 34131並網儲能變流器要求為基礎。

gap.en: GB/T 36276 is relevant but not a substitute for an IEC 62619 report if the Myanmar counterparty asks for IEC or MS-aligned evidence.
gap.zh: GB/T 36276具有相关性，但如缅甸交易方要求IEC或MS对应证据，则不能替代IEC 62619报告。
gap.zht: GB/T 36276具有相關性，但如緬甸交易方要求IEC或MS對應證據，則不能替代IEC 62619報告。

mandatory_status.target: Usually voluntary or project-driven; may become required by MSTRD scope, tender, lender, utility, or buyer specifications.
mandatory_status.cn: China baseline normally uses GB/T 36276, GB 4943.1 where applicable, and GB/T 34131.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep IEC 62619 evidence ready for cells and modules; map it to GB/T 36276 results instead of presenting the China report alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应准备电芯和模组的IEC 62619证据，并与GB/T 36276结果映射，而不是只提交中国报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應準備電芯和模組的IEC 62619證據，並與GB/T 36276結果映射，而不是只提交中國報告。

summary.en: IEC 62933 is the practical international reference for system-level BESS safety, including hazard identification, controls, protection functions, thermal runaway risk, and safe operation. Myanmar project stakeholders may request IEC 62933 evidence even when local standards are not strictly mandatory.
summary.zh: IEC 62933是储能系统整机安全的实际国际参考，涵盖危害识别、控制、保护功能、热失控风险和安全运行。即使当地标准并非严格强制，缅甸项目相关方也可能要求IEC 62933证据。
summary.zht: IEC 62933是儲能系統整機安全的實際國際參考，涵蓋危害識別、控制、保護功能、熱失控風險和安全運行。即使當地標準並非嚴格強制，緬甸項目相關方也可能要求IEC 62933證據。

standards_or_laws: Project owner and utility safety requirements

summary.en: Common China BESS evidence is typically built around GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion batteries for energy storage, GB 4943.1 for electrical safety where applicable, and GB/T 34131 for grid-connected energy storage converter requirements.
summary.zh: 中国常见储能系统证据通常以GB/T 36276储能用锂离子电池、适用时的GB 4943.1电气安全，以及GB/T 34131并网储能变流器要求为基础。
summary.zht: 中國常見儲能系統證據通常以GB/T 36276儲能用鋰離子電池、適用時的GB 4943.1電氣安全，以及GB/T 34131並網儲能變流器要求為基礎。

gap.en: China component-level evidence may not prove integrated system safety, BMS/PCS coordination, fault handling, safe isolation, emergency shutdown, or installation controls expected in a Myanmar project dossier.
gap.zh: 中国组件级证据可能无法证明缅甸项目档案所期望的集成系统安全、BMS/PCS协调、故障处理、安全隔离、紧急停机或安装控制。
gap.zht: 中國組件級證據可能無法證明緬甸項目檔案所期望的集成系統安全、BMS/PCS協調、故障處理、安全隔離、緊急停機或安裝控制。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; often required by utility, owner, lender, insurer, or tender even if standards are voluntary.
mandatory_status.cn: China baseline normally uses GB/T 36276, GB 4943.1 where applicable, and GB/T 34131; integrated system evidence may require extra mapping.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare a system-level IEC 62933 safety matrix covering BMS, PCS, protection, thermal controls, alarms, shutdown, and installation assumptions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应准备整机级IEC 62933安全矩阵，覆盖BMS、PCS、保护、热控、报警、停机和安装假设。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應準備整機級IEC 62933安全矩陣，覆蓋BMS、PCS、保護、熱控、警報、停機和安裝假設。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety for PCS, Cabinets, and Controls
requirement_topic.zh: PCS、电柜与控制设备电气安全
requirement_topic.zht: PCS、電櫃與控制設備電氣安全

summary.en: Myanmar review of BESS electrical equipment may look at shock protection, insulation, creepage, clearances, earthing, short-circuit withstand, temperature rise, cabinet ingress protection, and control-equipment safety. IEC-based evidence may be requested for PCS, switchgear, controls, and auxiliary equipment.
summary.zh: 缅甸对储能电气设备的审查可能关注防触电、绝缘、爬电距离、电气间隙、接地、短路耐受、温升、电柜防护等级和控制设备安全。PCS、开关设备、控制和辅助设备可能被要求提供IEC体系证据。
summary.zht: 緬甸對儲能電氣設備的審查可能關注防觸電、絕緣、爬電距離、電氣間隙、接地、短路耐受、溫升、電櫃防護等級和控制設備安全。PCS、開關設備、控制和輔助設備可能被要求提供IEC體系證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC electrical safety standards as applicable to equipment type

summary.en: Common China BESS evidence is typically built around GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion batteries for energy storage, GB 4943.1 for electrical safety where applicable, and GB/T 34131 for grid-connected energy storage converter requirements.
summary.zh: 中国常见储能系统证据通常以GB/T 36276储能用锂离子电池、适用时的GB 4943.1电气安全，以及GB/T 34131并网储能变流器要求为基础。
summary.zht: 中國常見儲能系統證據通常以GB/T 36276儲能用鋰離子電池、適用時的GB 4943.1電氣安全，以及GB/T 34131並網儲能變流器要求為基礎。

gap.en: GB 4943.1 may cover parts of electrical safety but may not match all IEC evidence requested for power conversion, switchgear, installation, and cabinet design in Myanmar projects.
gap.zh: GB 4943.1可覆盖部分电气安全，但未必匹配缅甸项目对功率变换、开关设备、安装和电柜设计要求的全部IEC证据。
gap.zht: GB 4943.1可覆蓋部分電氣安全，但未必匹配緬甸項目對功率變換、開關設備、安裝和電櫃設計要求的全部IEC證據。

mandatory_status.target: Depends on product scope, conformity review, utility requirements, and project specifications.
mandatory_status.cn: China baseline normally uses GB/T 36276, GB 4943.1 where applicable, and GB/T 34131; additional IEC electrical-safety mapping may be needed.

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology / MSTRD

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not stop at the battery report; include PCS, cabinet, protection, grounding, and control-equipment evidence in the Myanmar dossier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应止步于电池报告；缅甸档案应包括PCS、电柜、保护、接地和控制设备证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應止步於電池報告；緬甸檔案應包括PCS、電櫃、保護、接地和控制設備證據。
